overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \text {if I_{0} (\mathbf {R}) <   I_{1} (\mathbf {R}) and I_{2} (\mathbf {R}), choose H_{0},} \\ \text {if I_{1} (\mathbf {R}) <   I_{0} (\mathbf {R}) and I_{2} (\mathbf {R}), choose H_{1},} \\ \text {if I_{2} (\mathbf {R}) <   I_{0} (\mathbf {R}) and I_{1} (\mathbf {R}), choose H_{2}.} \end{array}\tag{101}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \text {if } I_{0} (\mathbf {R}) <   I_{1} (\mathbf {R}) \text { and } I_{2} (\mathbf {R})\text {, choose } H_{0}\text{,} \\ \text {if } I_{1} (\mathbf {R}) <   I_{0} (\mathbf {R}) \text { and } I_{2} (\mathbf {R})\text {, choose } H_{1}\text{,} \\ \text {if } I_{2} (\mathbf {R}) <   I_{0} (\mathbf {R}) \text { and } I_{1} (\mathbf {R})\text {, choose } H_{2}\text{.} \end{array}\tag{101}

overrides.expect: \Delta \mathcal {R} = \mathcal {R} (\hat {a} | \mathbf {R}) - \mathcal {R} (\hat {a} _ {\mathrm{ms}} | \mathbf {R}) = \int_ {0} ^ {\infty} C (Z) [ p _ {z | \mathbf {r}} (Z + \hat {a} - \hat {a} _ {\mathrm{ms}} | \mathbf {R}) p _ {z | \mathbf {r}} (Z - \hat {a} + \hat {a} _ {\mathrm{ms}} | \mathbf {R}) - 2 p _ {z | \mathbf {r}} (Z | \mathbf {R}) ] d Z. \tag {P}\tag{P.5}
overrides.new: \Delta \mathcal {R} = \mathcal {R} (\hat {a} | \mathbf {R}) - \mathcal {R} (\hat {a} _ {\mathrm{ms}} | \mathbf {R}) = \int_ {0} ^ {\infty} C (Z) [ p _ {z | \mathbf {r}} (Z + \hat {a} - \hat {a} _ {\mathrm{ms}} | \mathbf {R}) p _ {z | \mathbf {r}} (Z - \hat {a} + \hat {a} _ {\mathrm{ms}} | \mathbf {R}) - 2 p _ {z | \mathbf {r}} (Z | \mathbf {R}) ] d Z. \tag{P.5}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \ln \Lambda [ r (t) ] = \int_ {T _ {i}} ^ {T _ {f}} d u \int_ {T _ {i}} ^ {T _ {f}} h _ {w} (u, z) r (z) d z \int_ {T _ {i}} ^ {T _ {f}} h _ {w} (u, v) \sqrt {E} s (v) d v \\ - \frac {1}{2} \int_ {T _ {i}} ^ {T _ {f}} d u \int_ {T _ {i}} ^ {T _ {f}} h _ {w} (u, z) \sqrt {E} s (z) d z \int_ {T _ {i}} ^ {T _ {f}} h _ {w} (u, v) \sqrt {E} s (v) d v. \end{array} \tag {1.5}\tag{151}
